red.label: Red Candles
red.title: Magic Red Candles
red.description: The red candle is a symbol of passion, willpower, and fiery energy. Light it to awaken courage, attract love, or amplify your vital force. The red flame vibrates at the frequency of determination and desire.

white.label: White Candles
white.title: Magic White Candles
white.description: The white candle is a universal symbol of purity, healing, and spiritual enlightenment. It cleanses space of negative energy and opens channels of communication with higher powers. The white flame is the beginning of all beginnings.

green.label: Green Candles
green.title: Magic Green Candles
green.description: The green candle carries the energy of growth, prosperity, and renewal. Use it to attract abundance, financial success, and harmony with nature. The green flame is the breath of the earth itself.

orange.label: Orange Candles
orange.title: Magic Orange Candles
orange.description: The orange candle is a beacon of joy, creativity, and attraction. It stimulates enthusiasm, unlocks creative potential, and helps achieve goals. The orange flame dances with the energy of success.

black.label: Black Candles
black.title: Magic Black Candles
black.description: The black candle is a guardian of boundaries between worlds. It absorbs negative energy, destroys curses, and protects from dark forces. The black flame is a shield that reflects all evil back to its source.

blue.label: Blue Candles
blue.title: Magic Blue Candles
blue.description: The blue candle is a conductor of wisdom, tranquility, and intuition. Light it for meditation, developing clairvoyance, and finding inner peace. The blue flame is a mirror of the subconscious depths.

violet.label: Violet Candles
violet.title: Magic Violet Candles
violet.description: The violet candle is the key to higher consciousness and mystical secrets. It amplifies psychic abilities, opens the third eye, and connects with cosmic energy. The violet flame is a portal to the unseen.

about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: Keeper of the Flame
about.description: I am a practitioner of ancient traditions, dedicating my life to studying the mystical properties of candles and their influence on energy flows. Each candle in my collection is a tool of transformation, created with intention and consecrated by ritual.

poll.title: Mystic Poll
poll.question: Do you feel the energy?
poll.subtitle: The mysterious power of candles permeates the space. Do you sense its presence?
poll.thanks: Your voice has been heard. The flame remembers.

modal.title: Send a Request
modal.subtitle: Fill out the form, and we will help you choose the perfect candle.
modal.successDesc: We will contact you shortly. The flame of the soul awaits you.
